name: Fortinet, Inc.
summary: Fortinet, Inc. is a global cybersecurity company headquartered in Sunnyvale, California, focused on the convergence of networking and security. Its integrated platform, the Fortinet Security Fabric, spans secure networking, unified SASE, and AI-driven security operations. Key proprietary technologies include FortiOS (unified operating system), FortiASIC (custom security processors), FortiCloud (private SaaS cloud), FortiAI (AI-powered security), and FortiEndpoint. As of December 31, 2025, Fortinet served end-customers in over 100 countries across financial services, retail, healthcare, OT, government, and service provider verticals.
